rpcs.returnDescription: RETURNS: GLOBAL ARRAY Example: EXEMP1^12^EXEMPTION 1 -1^ERROR MESSAGE OR task #^REPORT AFTER earliest report time OR The return array will have entries with 3 pieces.  The first piece will be the field name, the second piece will contain the value to go in the specified block, the third piece is a s

rpcs.name: DSIRRPT2 PDH PATIENT DISC HIST
rpcs.description: This routine returns the data nescessary for the patient disclosure Requestor         .11 Reason          10.02 RequestorType   10.04 Status          10.08 Comment           .31 history report.  Required fields for this report:  From 19620      FIELD   From 19620.1    FIELD ---------------------   --------------------- RequestIEN        .01   DocumentCaption   .05 DateReceived    10.06   DocumentDate      .07
rpcs.returnDescription: Return Array $$DOCUMENT$$^Document Caption^Document Date (one line like this for each document) $$ENDOFDOCS$$ -1^Error message or The return array will contain strings formatted in groups (one per request) as follows: $$REQUEST$$^IEN^Date Recieved^Requestor^Reason^RequestorType^Status $$COMMENT1$$^C

rpcs.name: DSIRRPT4 CDD DISCREPANCY RPT
rpcs.description: This RPC returns data from the DSIR STATUS HISTORY file to review which request are being entered as closed on one day yet the status date is a previous date.
rpcs.returnDescription: RETURN ARRAY  or -1^error message if immediate ^ delimited  Clerk Name ^ Request Name ^ Open Date ^ Closed Date ^ Status Code ^ Status Date ^ Date User Entered Status  or if scheduled Task^REPORT AFTER yyymmdd.hhmmss

rpcs.name: DSIRRPTV FOIAV FOIA VALIDATION
rpcs.description: This RPC will return a global array of all records thkat were looked at for the year end FOIA report.  It will contain the internal request number and patient name/FOIA indicator, and a one for any block on the report that the given request was included on.  It also contains all record that, during the report period, were entered in error or of the type of request/requestor type of an excluded state reporting agency.
rpcs.returnDescription: RETURNS: GLOBAL ARRAY 6 EX3 5705 7 EX3 7332 8 EX3 5701 9 EX3 253B 10 EX3 APP3 11 EX3 205 12 Processed 13 Pend at Start 14 Received 15 Pend at End  16 Granted 17 Partial 18 Denied 19 Exemption 1 20 Exemption 2 21 Exemption 3 22 Exemption 4 23 Exemption 5 24 Exemption 6 25 Exemption 7A The return arra

rpcs.name: DSIRRPTR KCHK REPORT KILL CHK
rpcs.description: This procedure is used to check to see if the report cleanup task needs to be run. If yes, the DSIR REPORT KILL CHECK DATE parameter is updated and the cleanup task is queued.
rpcs.returnDescription: OUTPUT IS EITHER 0 (ZERO) WHICH INDICATES NO ACTION NEEDED 1 WHICH INDICATES THE REPORT CLEANUP TASK WAS SCHEDULED

rpcs.name: DSIRBIL0 BLSOUT BILLS DUE
rpcs.description: This routine retrieves a requestor from the provided request and creates an outstanding bill report for that requestor.
rpcs.returnDescription: Retuns an array which is in fact a formated text report.

rpcs.name: DSIROI4 BTCH BATCH PROCESSING
rpcs.description: This RPC clones requests in a batch manner.
rpcs.returnDescription: RETURN VALUE ONE BATCH REQUEST HAS BEEN CREATED or ## BATCH REQUESTS HAVE BEEN CREATED or -1^error message

rpcs.name: DSIROI4 EDOCS ELECT DOC CHECK
rpcs.description: Test a request to see if it has any electronic documents attached.
rpcs.returnDescription: RETURN 1 = YES, THE REQUEST CONTAINS ELECTRONIC DOCUMENTS 0 = YES, THE REQUEST DOESN NOT CONTAIN ELECTRONIC DOCUMENTS OR -1^ERROR MESSAGE

rpcs.name: DSIROI4 GETDEM GET DEMOGRAPHIC
rpcs.description: Returns limited demographic data required for processing a request.
rpcs.returnDescription: RETURNS THE FOLLOWING LABELS WITH VALUES 9 "WORK PHONE 10 "SSN 11 "ADDRESS TYPE 12 "ADDRESS STREET 1 13 "ADDRESS STREET 2 14 "ADDRESS STREET 3 15 "ADDRESS CITY 16 "ADDRESS STATE 17 "ADDRESS ZIP 18 "ADDRESS COUNTY 1 "NAME 19 "HOME PHONE 2 "FIRST 3 "MIDDLE 4 "LAST 5 "SUFFIX 6 "GENDER 7 "DOB 8 "DOD"

rpcs.name: DSIROIC ZIP CODE LOOKUP
rpcs.description: Looks up location information, city, state, and county based on inputted zip code.
rpcs.returnDescription: RETURN: on error return -1^error message else return p1^p2^p3^p4^p5^p6^p7^p8  where p1 = inputted zip code     p5 = FIPS county code p2 = city                  p6 = state abbreviation p3 = state (full name)     p7 = ptr to STATE file (#5) p4 = county (full name)    p8 = ptr to COUNTY CODE file (#5.1

rpcs.name: DSIROIC GETSTLST STATE LIST
rpcs.description: Gets state information from file 5.
rpcs.returnDescription: RETURNS State information as an array of strings as follows: IEN^STATE NAME^ABREVIATION or -1^Error Message

rpcs.name: DSIROIC CLKDAT GET CLERK INFO
rpcs.description: Look up for clerk info.
rpcs.returnDescription: RETURNS A 5 PIECE STRING FORMATTED AS FOLLOWS NAME^ OFFICE PHONE ^SIGNATURE BLOCK NAME ^SIGNATURE BLOCK TITLE^SERVICE/SECTION or -1^ERROR MESSAGE

rpcs.name: DSIROIC DOD GET DATE OF DEATH
rpcs.description: Get a patient's date of death.
rpcs.returnDescription: RETURNS A single date or a null if no date found OR AN ERROR -1^ERROR MESSAGE

rpcs.name: DSIROIC PATID GET DFN AND NAME
rpcs.description: Get patient information form a request.
rpcs.returnDescription: RETURNS A 2 PIECE STRING FORMATTED AS FOLLOWS IEN of patient^NAME of patient OR AN ERROR -1^ERROR MESSAGE

rpcs.name: DSIROI3 CKRQ CHK PAT REQUESTOR
rpcs.description: Checks requestor file for entries for a selected patient.
rpcs.returnDescription: RETURNS - ARRAY: IEN^LOOKUP NAME (.01 FIELD OF 19620.12) OR -1^PATIENT NOT IN REQUESTOR TABLE

rpcs.name: DSIROI STBLFLG SET BILL FLAG
rpcs.description: This routine checks the requestor attached to a request to see if there are any outstanding bills other than the current request.
rpcs.returnDescription: RETURNS 1 = One or more outstanding balances exits 0 = No outstanding balances or -1^error message

rpcs.name: TIU TEMPLATE GET TEMPLATE
rpcs.description: This RPC gets basic attributes of a given TIU Template (file 8927).
rpcs.returnDescription: Basic attributes of the given template are returned in '^'-delimited form.

rpcs.name: DENTV DELETE UNFILED DATA
rpcs.description: Input takes in an array of IENS for deletion. Upon completion, the RPC will return an array of IENS with a message. 0^File record deleted if successful, or -1^Error deleting record if unsuccessful.
rpcs.returnDescription: The return array is formatted the same as the input array. It will return an array of IENS with a message specifying if the delete was successful or unsuccessful.

rpcs.name: DENTV GET UNFILED DETAIL
rpcs.description: This procedure will take in a single IEN to return all data for the IEN in ^TMP("DENT",$J,N)=value.
rpcs.returnDescription: The return global array is in format ^TMP("DENT",$J,N)=value. There will be M number of nodes within the return where N is the first record and M is the last record.

rpcs.name: DENTV TP CLEAN SLATE
rpcs.description: This will process a clean slate on DPAT passed in. The RPC processes both clean slate, and undo clean slate. You must pass a flag to determine which process you want completed. ACT=1 means you want to process a clean slate, ACT=-1 means you want to undo a clean slate.  The clean slate can only be processed if there is no unfiled data for the patient. A clean slate undo can only be done if there no newer filed transactions for the patient.
rpcs.returnDescription: Returns 1^Message if successful clean slate. 0^Message if clean slate undo is successful. -1^Message if clean slate has an error.

rpcs.name: DENTV TP FILE EXAM TRANSACTION
rpcs.description: Files the new exam template modal data (OHA,PAR,OCC,TMJ) into a record in DATA("PROV")= Provider IEN DATA("DATE")= Date of transaction DATA("OHA")=CI PLAQUE INDEX^CARIES RISK^ORAL HYGIENE^XEROSTOMIA DATA("OCC")=MANDIBULAR^OPEN BITE^CROSS BITE^LEFT MOLAR RELAT^RIGHT MOLAR RELAT^LEFT CUSPID RELAT^RIGHT CUSPID RELAT^OVERBITE^OVERJET DATA("PAR")=BRUXING^CLENCHING^HISTORY^ DATA("PARWP",N)=PARAFUNCTIONAL HABIT NOTES (WORD PROCESSING) DATA("PARC")=ATTRITION^ABRASION^EROSION^HYPERTROPHY^OBSERVED^FACETED
rpcs.returnDescription: Returns a message 1^Message if the file is completed successfully. A -1^message will be returned when an error occurs.

rpcs.name: DENTV TP GET EXAM TRANSACTIONS
rpcs.description: This will return a complete list of exam transactions for a specified patient. The array is organized by node, not by date. For example all of the "OHA" Oral Health Assessment data is returned together. See GETFEX^DENTVTP7 comments for details.
rpcs.returnDescription: The return will group all return values by type (ex. "OHA" data will be DATA(4+N)=IEN^DATE^PROV^MANDIBULAR^OPEN BITE^CROSS BITE^LEFT MOLAR RELAT^RIGHT MOLAR RELAT^LEFT CUSPID RELAT^RIGHT CUSPID RELAT^OVERBITE^OVERJET DATA(5)=$$START^PAR DATA(6+N)=IEN^DATE^PROV^PAT REPORTS PAR^BRUXING^CLENCHING^HISTO

rpcs.name: DENTV GET CLEAN SLATE LIST
rpcs.description: Returns a list of all clean slates applied to a patient. Return example: RETURN(1)="1^Dates found RETURN(2)=3100101.120345 OR              RETURN(1)="-1^No clean slate present"
rpcs.returnDescription: Returns a list of all dates that a clean slate has been applied to the specified patient.

rpcs.name: DENTV UPDATE COMMENT SORT
rpcs.description: This will re-sort a providers canned comments within a category. It will return a 1^Successful or -1^Unsuccessful.
rpcs.returnDescription: The return will return a 1^Successful or a -1^Unsuccessful message.

rpcs.name: DENTV GET CANNED COMMENTS
rpcs.description: Returns the canned comments by provider, system, or both. The maximum number returned is 12. This limit is set by the GUI.
rpcs.returnDescription: Returns an array of up to 12 canned statements for a category. It will return all of the system specific statements first and any remainder up to 12 will be user/provider statements.

rpcs.name: DENTV FILE CANNED COMMENTS
rpcs.description: This rpc will file/update canned statements. There is no sort stored in this call. The record is automatically added to the bottom. You must use DENTV UPDATE COMMENT SORT to update sorting. The array must contain the following: DENTV("PROV") - Provider IEN DENTV("TYP") - 1: system, 2: user/provider DENTV("CAT") - 1: radio, 2: summary, 3: treatment, 4: educ, 5: disp DENTV(n) - n number of records for the WP field (the comment) DENTV("IEN") - Only Send this only if a record is being updated, a nul
rpcs.returnDescription: Returns 1^message^IEN^ if successful or -1^message if there is an error.

rpcs.name: DENTV DEL CANNED COMMENT
rpcs.description: Will delete a canned comment from the system. This will automatically resort the remaining records by filling in the gap (if any) left by removing the record.
rpcs.returnDescription: Returns 1^message if successful, or -1^message if unsuccessful.

rpcs.name: DENTV PERSON CLASS INQUIRY
rpcs.description: This is an RPC wrapper for the Kernal call $$GET^XUA4A72 to determine the active providers class information.
rpcs.returnDescription: Returns PERSON CLASS IEN^if the provider information is found and returned. Returns a -1^ if an error has occured; with a brief message to determine what was wrong.

rpcs.name: DENTV TP RESERVED INACT CHECK
rpcs.description: This RPC will perform a check on the IEN inputted and return whether or not the transaction found has been inactivated (for view only) or left alone. The check will inactivate a reserved transaction if it is more than 8 days old.
rpcs.returnDescription: The return value will specify whether the reserved transaction has been inactivated due to being more than 8 days old, or whether the transaction is still allowed to be loaded.

rpcs.name: DSIV XPAR CHGWP
rpcs.description: This will change an instance of a System Parameter that is of the Word Processing type.
rpcs.returnDescription: RET(0) = Code^Description     where  1^ = success. -1^error message = indicates failure and reason for failure.

rpcs.name: DSIV VALIDATE VI INDEX TERMS
rpcs.description: This Remote Procedure Call validates the interdependency of VI index terms.  It ensures that Type, Procedure/Event, and Specialty/SubSpecialty are active, checks to see if Type is Clinical if Procedure/Event or Specialty/SubSpecialty are input, and makes sure that the input Specialty/SubSpecialty is associated with the input Procedure/Event.
rpcs.returnDescription: An array is returned which contains status and error message (if necessary). DSIVDV(0)="1^Okay" OR "-1^error message"^error message"

rpcs.name: PSB GETINJECTIONSITE
rpcs.description: Get the last nn injections site info from the BCMA MEDICATION LOG file #53.9.   Get only of specific Orderable Items per patient in reverse chronology date/time order or All Orderable Items per patient in reverse chronology date/time order.
rpcs.returnDescription: Results[0

As such, it may not be changed in any way. | | Modifications to this software may result in an adulterated   | | medical device under 21CFR820, the use of which is considered | | to be a violation of US Federal Statutes.                     | +---------------------------------------------------------------+  This RPC retrieves the agency code of the VistA user. +-------------------------------------------------
rpcs.returnDescription: Get Agency code - V=VA, I=IHS

rpcs.description: Returns the status for cm applications: HL7 RUM SAGG TIMING

rpcs.description: Return list of Data Elements in format: piece^name  example 5^M Commands

rpcs.returnDescription: If TYPE=1 - array containing the user's option settings in format:", ' TYPE=2 - return <update complete> Piece 1: option name Piece 2: "" - no option setting - default to display 0 - do not display option 1 - display option  ex: array(0)="Error List^1 array(1)="Global List^0

rpcs.description: Return Timing dates in format:  array(0)=FMStartDate^ExtStartDate^FMEndDate^ExtEndDate array(1)=FMDate^ExtDate array(2)=FMDate^ExtDate array(...)=...
rpcs.returnDescription: Return Timing dates in format:  array(0)=FMStartDate^ExtStartDate^FMEndDate^ExtEndDate array(1)=FMDate^ExtDate array(2)=FMDate^ExtDate array(...)=...

rpcs.description: Get Timing Reports data.

rpcs.returnDescription: Array containing free text Report DEFINITION.

rpcs.name: KMPD TMG STATUS
rpcs.description: Timing Monitor status.

rpcs.description: Start/Stop RUM.

rpcs.returnDescription: KMPDY(0) = 0 - stop 1 - start

rpcs.name: KMPD RUM ENV
rpcs.description: RUM environment.
rpcs.returnDescription: RUM error message in format: KMPDRES(0)=ErrorNumber^ErrorText

rpcs.description: Search By list.
rpcs.returnDescription: Search by list in format: KMPDY(0)=ClientName KMPDY(1)=ClientName ...

rpcs.description: Return a list of errors for a certain date from file #3.075 (ERROR LOG).
rpcs.returnDescription: Array in format: Array(0)=ErrorNumber^ErrorText^TimeOfError

rpcs.name: VPS GET CLINIC
rpcs.description: Called by the Vetlink Kiosk system.  The RPC will accept a single input value representing the name of the clinic (full or partial name); and the output produced will be an array that returns all the possible matches for the clinic (one to many clinics).  Values returned will be the name of the clinic and the ien of the clinic.
rpcs.returnDescription: A single dimensional array that represents each clinic that matched to LIST(1005)="44^1567^10^^PHYSICAL LOCATION the input value.  The syntax of the array is: LIST(n) = "FileNum^ClinicIEN^FieldNum^Data^FieldName Exception return value: LIST(n)="-1^Error text message  Example of successful return val

rpcs.description: Called by the Vetlink Kiosk system.  The RPC will accept a single input value whic is the patient SSN.  The RPC returns the patient demographics, insurance, and appointments (Starting from T-60 and including future appointments).
rpcs.returnDescription: Single dimensional array that represents the patient demographics, appointments, insurance information. ARRAY(n)=File#^dfn;multiple entries^field#^Data^Fieldname exception data string: ARRAY(n)="-1^Error text message"

rpcs.name: EDPGLOB RPC
rpcs.description: This RPC acts as the "front controller" for laboratory data calls. The RPC uses the parameters passed in to gather lab data for a given patient, and return the data in XML format.
rpcs.returnDescription: The return results are formatted as an XML document.

rpcs.name: DSIV ONE LOC APPTS
rpcs.description: Request all appointments for one hospital location with insurance flag, check-in user, check-out user, and manual patient flag.
rpcs.returnDescription: Global array.  Each node has 10-12 pieces. a.  Field #.3192 COVERED BY INSURANCE=NO or UNKNOWN b.  For ANY .312 field 3 entry If Last Verified > n DAYS before today AND expiration date > today OR  expiration date is NULL Flag Value 0=Otherwise  The 8th and 9th ^-pieces have additional information if

rpcs.description: Returns productivity report data which in a combination of the ICB Entered By User and Exception reports.
rpcs.returnDescription: Global array containing report data: when DSIVRPT="C" for Clinic then return is: turn=Clinic^totalentries^totalnoins^totalexceptions when DSIVRPT="U" for User then return is: Return=User^totalentries^totalnoins^totalexceptions when  DSIVRPT="CU" for Both Clinic and User then return is: Clinic|User^t

rpcs.name: DSIV POLL PRODUCTIVITY
rpcs.description: Used to check the status of the background job kicked off by the DSIV PRODUCTIVITY REPORT rpc and to return results from that report.

rpcs.name: DSIV FILE INSURANCE TO AUDIT
rpcs.description: Files new insurance data fields from ICB to the DSIV ICB AUDIT (#19625) file that are not part of the INSURANCE BUFFER (#355.33) file so that they may be updated as part of buffer processing by insurance verifiers.

rpcs.name: DGBT CLAIM DEDUCTIBLE PAID
rpcs.description: THIS RPC IS USED BY BENEFICIARY TRAVEL PACKAGE TO RETRIEVE TRAVEL CLAIM INFORMATION ABOUT ANY TRAVEL CLAIMS FOR PATIENT.
rpcs.returnDescription: THE RPC WILL RETURN THE NUMBER OF CLAIMS AND AMOUNT OF DEDUCTIBLE PAID BY A PATIENT DURING THE CURRENT MONTH.

rpcs.name: DVBAB GET VVA TOKEN
rpcs.description: This remote procedure retrieves the username, password, and token value passed to the Virtual VA web service.

rpcs.name: DVBAB 8861 NOTIFICATIONS
rpcs.description: This will perform MailMan notifications for Form 8861 Requests based on the status of the request.
rpcs.returnDescription: The RPC returns either a success or failure to send the MailMan notification, either 0 or 1.

rpcs.name: DVBA MVI SEARCH PERSON

DVBOUT(2)="523^BOSTON HCS VAMC^523 Each line contains INSTITUTION (#4) file IEN, station name ,and station number delimited by a caret ("^").  The first entry in the list contains the total number of stations returned.  Format:

rpcs.name: DSIR RX CHECK

rpcs.returnDescription: Return Array -1 ^ Missing Start Date! 0 ^ No Prescriptions for Date Range! Entries left from the DATA array that fall in the date range

rpcs.name: XUS PKI GET UPN
rpcs.description: This RPC gets the SUBJECT ALTERNATIVE NAME field from the New Person (#200) file field 501.2.  It is used to check that the correct PIV card has been put into the reader.

rpcs.name: XUS PKI SET UPN
rpcs.description: This RPC is used to set the SUBJECT ALTERNATIVE NAME in the New Person #(200) file field 501.2.

rpcs.name: XU EPCS EDIT
rpcs.description: This remote procedure stores information on editing changes in file 200 related to the electronic prescribing of controlled substances.

rpcs.name: ORDEA DEATEXT
rpcs.description: Returns the text to show on the signature dialog mandated by DEA for when a controlled substance order is selected to be signed.

rpcs.name: ORDEA SIGINFO
rpcs.description: returns the provider/patient info that must be displayed when signing a controlled substance order(s)

rpcs.name: ORWPCE ICDVER
rpcs.description: Returns the ICD coding system version to be used for diagnosis look-up, as of a particular date of interest.

rpcs.name: ORQQPL4 LEX
rpcs.description: This RPC supports the Clinical Lexicon Search for Problem List. It will ', "return an indefinite list of terms that match the user's search string.

rpcs.name: ORDEA LNKMSG
rpcs.description: Returns the text of the OR DEA PIV LINK MSG parameter.

rpcs.name: ORWPCE4 LEX
rpcs.description: Returns list of coded elements based on lexicon look-up. Introduced with CPRS v29 to maintain compatibility of older call ORWPCE LEX.

rpcs.name: DENTVUTL PNL PANEL CHG

rpcs.description: Call FIND^DIC to get a list of matches on the file for the input value
rpcs.returnDescription: Returns an array in the following format:  1^CPRSPATIENT,FIRSTNAME1^000000001 2^CPRSPATIENT,FIRSTNAME2^000000002  but if FIELD=".09^.01", you would see:  1^000000001^CPRSPATIENT,FIRSTNAME1 2^000000002^CPRSPATIENT,FIRSTNAME2  Array[0

rpcs.name: DSIV DDR FILER
rpcs.description: This calls FILE^DIE to file data.  It can only file data at a single level (top, multiple, a multiple within a multiple, etc.).  It presumes you know how to set Param[x
rpcs.returnDescription: Successful, return 1^ Else return -1^error message

rpcs.name: DSIV DDR DELETE ENTRY
rpcs.description: This will delete a record from a file or subfile.
rpcs.returnDescription: If the entry is successfully deleted, return 1^ Else return 0^message

rpcs.name: DSIV DDR UPDATE FILE
rpcs.description: This will add a new record to a file, but only at the top level of the file.   It does not allow for adding a new record to a multiple. Additional fields to be filed at the same time can be passed.
rpcs.returnDescription: If a new record is successfully created, return 1^new record number Else return, -1^message

rpcs.name: DSIV FM GET FIELD ATTRIB MULT
rpcs.description: This will return field attributes from a selected file for one or more fields.
rpcs.returnDescription: On error or problems, return List[0

rpcs.name: DSIV FM FILER
rpcs.description: This invokes the Fileman filer to update records for an existing entry. This will allow you to update any field at the level of the FILE including word processing fields.  It does not allow for updating different levels of the file.  If you wish to update a subfile, then you will have to make multiple calls to this RPC for each file or subfile.
rpcs.returnDescription: If no problems are encountered filing data, then return LIST[1

rpcs.name: DSIV LIMIT EIV
rpcs.description: This RPC returns the value of field #62.01 (LIMIT OF EIV FIELDS?) from file #350.9 (IB SITE PARAMETERS).  This is to allow the GUI to know how many characters are allowed to be entered for SUBSCRIBER ADDRESS LINE 1 and SUBSCRIBER ADDRESS LINE 2.
rpcs.returnDescription: This RPC will return one of two results:  1^The EIV field is not limited 0^The EIV field is limited  If 1 is returned, the GUI may use the new extended character limits Else, GUI should function as before with shorter character limits

rpcs.name: VPS GET CLINICAL REMINDERS
rpcs.description: Called by the Vetlink Kiosk system. The RPC returns the DUE NOW Clinical Reminders for the patient.

rpcs.name: VPS PATIENT WRISTBAND PRINT
rpcs.description: This RPC prints patient wristband to VistA printer using VistA standard pat Patient Wristband Print routine (DGPWB).

rpcs.name: VPS PRINT PATIENT LABEL
rpcs.description: This RPC prints patient label using the standard VistA Print Patient Label routine (DGPLBL).

rpcs.name: VPS ENHANCED GET PATIENT DEMO
rpcs.description: This RPC is called  by the Vetlink Kiosk (point of service) system. Given Patient SSN or DFN or ICN or VIC/CAC, this RPC returns the patient demographics,insurance,and up-coming appointments, etc for selected categories

rpcs.name: VPS GET PRINTERS
rpcs.description: This RPC returns up to 20 entries from the device file based on Input Criteria.

rpcs.name: VPS GET ALL CLINICS
rpcs.description: This RPC returns a list of hospital locations (defined in the HOSPITAL LOCATION file), which conform the criteria.
rpcs.returnDescription: A negative value of the first "^"-piece of the RESULTS(0) indicates that an error occurred during the execution of the remote procedure. In this case, the second piece of the RESULT(0) will contain number of the error descriptors returned in the ^01: Number of locations ^02: From Name ^03: From IEN

rpcs.name: VPS GET APPOINTMENTS
rpcs.description: This RPC will return appointments for a given data range for a specific Appointment Queue. This RPC will refresh an existing queue with the current appointments and typically need to be called only once a day.

rpcs.name: VPS GET CHANGED APPOINTMENTS
rpcs.description: This RPC will only return new, modified, or deleted appointments and should be called periodically by VetLink to update the appointment queue.

rpcs.name: VPS SAVE CLINICAL SURVEY
rpcs.description: This RPC will return success flag (1) or error flag (-1^error message) Survey Internal Name VPSDATA(2) = INTERNAL^^Survey Internal #1 Questionnaire Template ID VPSDATA(3) = TEMPLATE ID^^5 Survey Version VPSDATA(4) = VERSION^^10 Date/Time Survey was taken VPSDATA(5) = DATE/TIME TAKEN^^9/24/2014@093001 Date/Time Survey was modified VPSDATA(6) = DATE/TIME MODIFIED^^12/31/2014@153301 VPSDFN  : Patient IEN Completion STATUS (C=Completed, I=Incomplete) VPSDATA(7) = STATUS^^C DUZ of INTERVIEWER VPSDATA

rpcs.name: VPS GET SURVEY DATA
rpcs.description: Retrieves an array containing the patient's Clinical Survey information.
rpcs.returnDescription: AN array is returned. VPSRES(2) =     PATIENT ^ QUESTIONNAIRE TEMPLATE ID ^ QUESTIONNAIRE TEMPLATE NAME ^ QUESTIONNAIRE TEMPLATE IEN ^ VERSION VPSRES(3) =     <RESPONSE> VPSRES(4) =          RESPONSE IDENTIFIER ^ DATE/TIME TAKEN ^ DATE/TIME LAST MODIFIED VPSRES(5) =          COMPLETION STATUS ^ PATI

rpcs.name: VPS GET ALLERGIES
rpcs.description: Called by the Vetlink Kiosk system.   VPS GET ALLEGIES retrieves patient allergy data stored in an entry or entries in the PATIENT ALLERGIES file (120.8).  The retrieved data is made available to the Vetlink system.
rpcs.returnDescription: Data taken from an entry or entries stored in the PATIENT ALLERGIES field is defined 3.      iens are the internal entry numbers at which the allergy record is stored.  This element can have either the entry level ien for non-multiple or it can have both the entry level ien and the sub-entry ien.

rpcs.name: VPS WRITE MRAR PDO
rpcs.description: Called by the Vetlink Kiosk system.  The RPC will accept 4 input parameters; and will return output when processing completes or ends with an exception.  Vetlink Kiosk has the Medication Review Allergy Review modules where a  veteran can review and make changes to his medications and any allergies.  The MRAR can also be facilitated by a provider.  The local arrays identify the field to be updated along with the respective data changes and serves to the RPC.
rpcs.returnDescription: Local array that returns the results of each updated field per array data specific field and exception message describes the error. element.  SUCCESS : localArray(n) = FIELD NAME^ARRAY IENS^DATA^1 1 equals successful update to the database of the specific field declared at field label.  FAILED  : lo

rpcs.name: VPS WRITE KIOSK PARAMETERS
rpcs.description: Called by the VetLink Kiosk system. This RPC will accept three input where      n           : an incremental number that acts as an index field label : the name of VistA Field Name field value : the parameter value to be stored in VistA  The output result has similar array structure as the array(n) with an addition of the result code and potential exception message Successful output structure is constructed as: output(n)  = field label^field value^1', "                    value '1' at the end in

rpcs.name: VPS GET MRAR PDO
rpcs.description: Software that supports this procedure will build a global array with each subscript in the array assigned a line of text representing clinical data (allergy and medications) associated with the results of a Medication Review Allergy Review with the veteran.  This is referred to as PDO output and will be presented as a note on the STAFF-FACING interface on Vetlink.
rpcs.returnDescription: A global array with each subscript in the array assigned a line of text representing clinical data (allergy and medications) associated with the results of a Medication Review Allergy Review with the veteran.

rpcs.name: VPS UPDATE LAST MRAR TIU IEN
rpcs.description: This RPC will update the last Allergy and Modication review (MRAR) for a patient with TIU Document IEN. The last MRAR is defined as the last transaction date for a patient in file 853.5 (VPS MRAR PDO)

rpcs.name: VPS GET LAST MRAR
rpcs.description: Given Patient ID (in ID/Type pair), this RPC return the last Medication and Allergy Review data for the patient.
rpcs.returnDescription: This RPC will return the last Medication and Allergy Review for the patient.

rpcs.name: DENTVX2 GETWP
rpcs.description: This RPC takes in an entity, parameter name, and instance number and returns the word processing information for the given instance of the parameter.
rpcs.returnDescription: Returns an array List[n

rpcs.name: DENTVX2 FILEWP
rpcs.description: This RPC takes in an entity, parameter name, instance number, and the data to be filed.
rpcs.returnDescription: If successful, the return will be 1^Success. If unsuccessful, the return will be -1^error message.

rpcs.name: DENTVGUI VERSION GET
rpcs.description: This is an RPC which returns the current valid DRM Plus GUI version and the current valid KID patch number.
rpcs.returnDescription: The result will be returned as a single value List[1

rpcs.name: DENTVICD ACTICD
rpcs.description: Verify that an ICD code is active as of a certain date
rpcs.returnDescription: Returns a single value List[n

rpcs.name: DENTVICD ICD GET DIAG
rpcs.description: This will return specific information for a diagnosis code
rpcs.returnDescription: Return: p5  = UNACCEPTABLE AS PRINCIPAL DX (#101) (1:yes) p6  = MAJOR DIAGNOSTIC CATEGORY ien (#5) p7  = MDC13 (#5.5) p8  = COMPLICATION/COMORBIDITY (#70) p9  = ICD EXPANDED (#8) p10 = STATUS where 0:inactive;1:active p11 = SEX (#9.5) [M/F

rpcs.name: DENTVICD LIST
rpcs.description: This will return a list of active ICD codes for a lookup value.
rpcs.returnDescription: This returns a list of active diagnosis codes matching the lookup value. List[n

rpcs.name: DENTVICD ICD10 ACTIVATION DATE
rpcs.description: This RPC will return the activation date of ICD-10.
rpcs.returnDescription: The RPC will return a single value, List[0

rpcs.name: XUS IAM ADD USER
rpcs.description: RPC ICR #6290 - API ICR #none This restricted RPC is used exclusively by the Identity and Access Management (IAM) Provisioning application to add a user to the VistA NEW PERSON file (#200).  The XUSPF200 Security Key is required to add a user without an SSN (file #200 special privileges).
rpcs.returnDescription: Fail    R(0)               = "-1^Number of Errors R(1) through R(n)  = "Error Message Success R(0)               = "DUZ^STATION"

rpcs.name: XUS IAM EDIT USER
rpcs.description: RPC ICR #6291 - API ICR #none The XUSPF200 Security Key is required to edit a user without an SSN (file #200 special privileges). This restricted RPC is used exclusively by the Identity and Access Management (IAM) Provisioning application to edit an existing user in the VistA NEW PERSON file (#200).  The XUSHOWSSN Security Key is required to edit Personally Identifiable Information (PII) such as Social Security Number (SSN) or Date of Birth (DOB).
rpcs.returnDescription: Success RES(0)=DUZ of NEW PERSON file entry that was edited Fail    RES(0)="-1^Number of Errors RES(1) through Y(n)="Error Message"

rpcs.name: XUS IAM FIND USER
rpcs.description: RPC ICR #6288 - API ICR #none This restricted RPC is used exclusively by the Identity and Access Management (IAM) Provisioning application to find a list of users that satisfy a collection of input criteria.  One or more of the input array values must be set by the calling application. The XUSHOWSSN Security Key is required to do lookups using Personally Identifiable Information (PII) such as Social Security Number (SSN) or Date of Birth (DOB).
rpcs.returnDescription: Fail    R(0)="-1^Error Message Success R(0)=total number of entries found, from "0" to "n". R(1) through R(n)="DUZ^Name^Name Components^SSN^Dob^AD UPN^SecID"

rpcs.name: XUS IAM DISPLAY USER
rpcs.description: RPC ICE #6289 - API ICR #none This restricted RPC is used exclusively by the Identity and Access Management (IAM) Provisioning application to display a VistA user.  The XUSHOWSSN Security Key is required to display Personally Identifiable Information (PII) such as Social Security Number (SSN) or Date of Birth (DOB).
rpcs.returnDescription: Fail R("INITIAL") = INITIAL R("TITLE") = TITLE R("NICK_NAME") = NICK NAME R("SSN") = SSN (<Hidden> if caller does not hold XUSHOWSSN key) R("DOB") = DOB (<Hidden> if caller does not hold XUSHOWSSN key) R("DEGREE") = DEGREE R("MAIL_CODE") = MAIL CODE R("STATUS") = $$ACTIVE^XUSER(DISPDUZ) R("DISUSER")

rpcs.name: XUS ESSO VALIDATE
rpcs.description: RPC ICR #6295 - API ICR #none This API/RPC uses the VA Identity and Access Management (IAM) SAML token definition version 1.2 attributes from a SAML token for user sign-on.
rpcs.returnDescription: R(0) = DUZ if sign-on was OK, zero if not OK.', "R(1) = (0=OK, 1,2...=Can't sign on for some reason).", 'R(2) = Verify Code needs changing. R(3) = Message. R(4) = 0 R(5) = count of the number of lines of text, zero if none. R(5+n) = message text.

rpcs.name: XUS IAM BIND USER
rpcs.description: RPC ICR #6294 - API ICR #none This restricted RPC is used exclusively by the Identity and Access Management (IAM) Binding application to set the Security ID (SecID) and Active Directory UPN (ADUPN) in the VistA NEW PERSON file (#200) for Single Sign-On Internal (SSOi).
rpcs.returnDescription: Return: Fail    Y = "-1^Error Message Success Y = DUZ

rpcs.name: MPI TK POC USER SETUP
rpcs.description: This remote procedure call (RPC) is invoked when a VistA user uses the option MPIF TK POC USER SETUP to confirm their traits and establish a TK POC record on the MPI in the New Person file (#200).
rpcs.returnDescription: 1 for successful creation  or  -1^error message

rpcs.name: DSIRRPT6 RQSTRS REPORT
rpcs.description: This RPC will return entries from the DSIR NEW REQUESTORS file (#19620.12) in alphabetical order.  The report can be pulled for all requestors or in an alphabetic range, and further sorted by those flagged as Active, Inactive or Both.
rpcs.returnDescription: Return Array (0) = 0 ^ No records found! (n) = Requestor IEN (19620.12) ^ Requestor Name ^ Inactive (1/0) ^ Street Address 1 ^ Street Address 2 ^ Street Address 3 ^ City ^ State Abrv ^ Zip

rpcs.name: DSIROI9 INACTRQR INACTIVATE
rpcs.description: This RPC should be used to toggle the Inactive field of the DSIR NEW REQUESTOR file (#19620.12).
rpcs.returnDescription: Return Value -1 ^ Internal Entry Number Undefined or Not Found! IEN = Successful Update

rpcs.name: DVBA CAPRI GETCONTREMARKS
rpcs.description: This gets the remarks sent to the contractor concerning the 2507 REQUEST in file 396.3. The remarks are stored in the word processing field #103 of the 2507 EXAM file 396.4.
rpcs.returnDescription: Returns a 1 if remarks exist

rpcs.name: DVBA CAPRI SETCONTREMARKS
rpcs.description: The RPC sets remarks sent to the contractor into the new word processing field #103 of the 2507 EXAM file 396.4. The 2507 EXAMs are connected to the 2507 REQUEST file via a pointer.
rpcs.returnDescription: returns a 1 when set

rpcs.name: SCMC FILER
rpcs.description: Generic call to FILE^DIE and UPDATE^DIE Fileman DBS APIs.
rpcs.returnDescription: If file update is successful, then a 1 is returned. A 0 is returned if unsuccessful.

rpcs.name: SCMC GETS ENTRY DATA
rpcs.description: Calls Fileman DBS API - GETS^DIQ
rpcs.returnDescription: An array containing found items.  The content and format depends on parameters passed in "FIELDS" and "FLAGS"

rpcs.name: SCMC LISTER
rpcs.description: Calls Fileman DBS API - LIST^DIC
rpcs.returnDescription: An array containing found items.  The content and format depends on parameters passed in "FIELDS" and "FLAGS"

rpcs.name: SCMC FINDER
rpcs.description: Calls Fileman DBS API - FIND^DIC
rpcs.returnDescription: An array containing found items.  The content and format depends on parameters passed in "FIELDS" and "FLAGS"

rpcs.name: SCMC GET PATIENT ENCOUNTERS
rpcs.description: This RPC will return an array of patient encounter data. See return parameter description below.
rpcs.returnDescription: Returns an array with these elements in each entry 7   Checkout Completed Date/Time  409.68/.07 8   Encounter IEN                 409.68/IEN 9   Encounter Parent IEN          409.68/.06 10  Visit IEN                     9000010/IEN 11  Visit Parent IEN              9000010/.12 12  Hospital Location

rpcs.name: SCMC GET NEW PERSON
rpcs.description: This RPC provides the functionality to query the New Person (#200) file. The calling application may query the New Person (#200) file by using either the VPID or IEN of the requested entry or part or all of a last name. Other optional parameters may be passed to the call as additional filters.
rpcs.returnDescription: An array with the following nodes: ^TMP($J,"SCMCQRY",1) - 1 if found, 0 if not found ^TMP($J,"SCMCQRY",n,0) - VPID^IEN^Last Name~First Name~Middle Name^SSN^DOB^SEX^Phone^Pager^ ^TMP($J,"SCMCQRY",n,1) - Provider Type^   (Person Class) ^TMP($J,"SCMCQRY",n,2) - Provider Classification^ ^TMP($J,"SCMCQRY

rpcs.name: SCMC PATIENT DIEDON
rpcs.description: Get patient date of death.
rpcs.returnDescription: Returns date of death if patient has expired.  Otherwise returns 0. Errors: -1^Missing DFN parameter. -1^Patient was not found.

rpcs.name: SCMC PATIENT INFO
rpcs.description: This RPC returns patient demographic data.
rpcs.returnDescription: Returns patient demographic data in a ^ delimited string. -1^Patient was not found. -1^Error retrieving patient data.  1      2         3   4   5   6     7             8           9 DFN^PATIENT NAME^SSN^DOB^AGE^SEX^MARITAL STATUS^ACTIVE DUTY^ADDRESS1^ 10        11      12   13    14  15      16

rpcs.name: SCMC PCDETAIL
rpcs.description: Returns detailed PACT and other team assignment information for a patient. Used to batch load CPRS PC Window Cache during PCMMR deployment.
rpcs.returnDescription: An array of detailed PACT and other team assignment information.

rpcs.name: SCMC FTEE CREATE
rpcs.description: This RPC will create an FTEE history record in the Position Assignment History File (404.52).
rpcs.returnDescription: Return code: IEN of history record created  Errors: 0^Missing record IEN 0^Error creating FTEE history record

rpcs.name: SCMC FTEE READ
rpcs.description: This RPC will read an FTEE history record from the Position Assignment History File (404.52).
rpcs.returnDescription: FTEE history record values: ien^history date^ftee value^user ien(duz) Errors: 0^Missing record IEN 0^Missing FTEE record IEN

rpcs.name: SCMC FTEE UPDATE
rpcs.description: This RPC will update an FTEE history record in the Position Assignment History File (404.52).
rpcs.returnDescription: Return code: 1 = record updated Errors: 0^Missing record IEN 0^Missing FTEE record IEN 0^Error updating FTEE history record

rpcs.name: SCMC FTEE DELETE
rpcs.description: This RPC will delete an FTEE history record from the Position Assignment History File (404.52).
rpcs.returnDescription: Return code: defaults to 1 (there is no return code from ^DIK Fileman API) Errors: 0^Missing record IEN 0^Missing FTEE record IEN

rpcs.name: SCMC FTEE READALL
rpcs.description: This RPC will read all FTEE history records from the Position Assignment History File (404.52).
rpcs.returnDescription: FTEE history record values:  Errors: retval(0)="0^Missing record IEN an array of: ien^history date^ftee value^user ien(duz) Example: retval(0)=0  (no records found)  retval(0)=3  (3 records) retval(1)="1^3100608.1123^.05^452 retval(2)="2^3100608.1123^.2^452 retval(3)="3^3110113.1422^.0^452"

rpcs.name: TIU CAN PRINT WORK/CHART COPY
rpcs.description: This RPC evaluates whether a user can print a Document, and if so, whether the user can print only a Work Copy or may print EITHER a Work Copy or a Chart Copy. Authorization to print is determined by ASU Business Rules, and what type of copy by TIU Document Parameter ALLOW CHART PRINT OUTSIDE MAS. A user is in MAS" if they are a member of ASU User Class MEDICAL INFORMATION SECTION.
rpcs.returnDescription: TIUY = 0^Can't Message:  User can't print EITHER copy. (Fails Bus Rules)", 'TIUY = 1: User may print a Work Copy only. TIUY = 2: User may print either a Work Copy or a Chart Copy.

rpcs.name: ORWRP1A RADIO
rpcs.description: Check to determine the method of selecting Date Ranges on the Reports and Labs Tabs in CPRS.

rpcs.name: ORDEBUG SAVERPCS
rpcs.description: Saves RPC log from CPRS to be used for other purposes/debugging problems
rpcs.returnDescription: Will always be 1

rpcs.name: ORDEBUG SAVEDESC
rpcs.description: Saves a user supplied description of why they are saving the RPC log from CRPS
rpcs.returnDescription: Will always be 1

rpcs.name: ORQQCN GET USER AUTH
rpcs.description: This RPC returns the update authority of a user for a specific Consult.
rpcs.returnDescription: The value returned is the equivalent of this set of codes: 0 = not an update user 1 = unrestricted access user 2 = update user 3 = administrative update user 4 = admin AND update user 5 = IFC coordinator -1 = Error occurred (-1^Error Msg)

rpcs.name: ORUTL ISCLORD
rpcs.description: returns 1 if the ORIFN passed in is a clinic order, 0 otherwise

rpcs.name: ORBCMA5 LOCK
rpcs.description: Due to issues with LOCKing between the CPRS GUI chart and the BCMAOrderCom dll, some changes are necessary to how locks are handled when locking the patient chart.  Using the $J value for the CPRS GUI session, the CPRS GUI will call the BCMAOrderCom dll and pass in the $J value and this value is used for ', "locking the patient's chart.
rpcs.returnDescription: If the lock is successful, a return value of 1 is sent.  If the lock fails, the return value is a 0^ followed by text indicating why the lock failed.

rpcs.name: ORBCMA5 JOB
rpcs.description: Due to issues with LOCKing between the CPRS GUI chart and the BCMAOrderCom dll, some changes are necessary to how locks are handled when locking the patient chart.  In order to facility those changes, the CPRS GUI chart needs to know the $J value for the running process for the open connection on the M server.  The purpose of this RPC is to return that $J value.
rpcs.returnDescription: Returns the $J value.

rpcs.name: ORUTL4 DLL
rpcs.description: This RPC will check the version of the user's DLL against the current ", 'version defined on the server for compatibility.
rpcs.returnDescription: If the version of the DLL on the user's machine is compatible with the ", 'version defined on the server, this RPC will return a 1. Otherwise the following string format is returned depending on the DLL: -1^<message string> or -1^<required server version>^<message string>.

rpcs.name: HMP PUT OPERATIONAL DATA

rpcs.returnDescription: The IEN of the sites "ASAP" urgency selection

rpcs.name: XUS MVI NEW PERSON DATA
rpcs.description: This RPC will return calculated data analysis from NEW PERSON file (#200) ', "at VistA for user's selection criteria for active and non active NEW ", 'PERSON entries.  Active New Person aggregated data for one or all below elements: SECID AUDPN (Email) NT USERNAME
rpcs.returnDescription: RETURN: Total Count^Total Non Active^Total Active^Total SECID^Total Email^Total NT User^Total Visitors

rpcs.name: XOBV VALIDATE SAML
rpcs.description: This RPC receives a SAML token to validate a user logon to VistA.
rpcs.returnDescription: Returns user\'s DUZ if successful, otherwise returns "1^error message".

rpcs.name: DSIYUTL EQSCH EQUIP SEARCH
rpcs.description: Searches the EQUIPMENT INV. (#6914) file by requested field.
rpcs.returnDescription: Returns a list of search results in format: P4=MODEL P5=SERIAL P6=STATUS P7=PO# P8=EQUIPMENT CATEGORY P9=CMR P10=ACQUISITION DATE P11=TOTAL ASSET VALUE P12=LOCATION P13=PREV LOC  P14=OWNER/DEPT P15=LAST INV DATE P16=REPLACEMENT DATE P17=WARRANTY END DATE P18=ENTERED BY P19=DATE ENTERED DSIYRET(1)="-

rpcs.name: DSIYUTL EQINFO EQUIP INFO
rpcs.description: Gets display information for a requested piece of equipment.
rpcs.returnDescription: Returns list of data fields in format:  RET(1) = "-1^Error Message" for errors RET(1) = "0^Warning Message for warnings RET(#) = Field # ^ Table Name ^ Internal Value ^ External Value

rpcs.name: DSIYUTL EQCMT EQUIP COMMENTS
rpcs.description: Returns the text in the comments field from the EQUIPMENT INV. (#6914) file for a requested entry.
rpcs.returnDescription: Returns the COMMENTS (#40) field.

rpcs.name: DSIYUTL EQSPEX EQUIP SPEX
rpcs.description: Return the SPEX (#70) field data for an entry in the EQUIPMENT INV. (#6914) FILE.
rpcs.returnDescription: The SPEX (#70) field data for the item.

rpcs.name: DSIYUTL2 MFGSCH MFG NAME SCH
rpcs.description: MFGSCH Searches the Manufacturer File (^ENG("MFG"))  file # 6912 Returns the NOREC number of records based on both the XREF "B" (name of manufacturer) and XREF "C" (synonym of manufacturer) Will search backwards or forwards depending on setting of MOVE variable.
rpcs.returnDescription: RETURN PARAMETER Data is returned in the global array DSIYRET(NAME)=IEN^NAME^Synonym info if it exists  DSIYRET(1)="-1^Error Message" if there is an error DSIYRET(1)="0^Warning Message" if there is a warning

rpcs.name: DSIYUTL2 EQCTSCH EQ CAT SCH
rpcs.description: EQCTSCH This RPC returns information about Equipment Category (file 6911) to the calling program.  It allows moves backwards and forwards through the file.
rpcs.returnDescription: DSIYRET Return parameter.  DSIYRET(NAME)=IEN^NAME^Synonym if it exists DSIYRET(1)="-1^Error Message" if errors DSIYRET(1)="0^Warning Message" if warnings

rpcs.name: DSIYUTL2 MFGDET MFG DET
rpcs.description: MFGDET RPC to return details for one Manufacturer in the Manufacturer List File based on the IEN#
rpcs.returnDescription: DSIYRET - Global Array  DSIYRET(1) = IEN^DIV/MFG Manufacturer Name^Manufacturer Long Name DSIYRET(2) = Division^Street^City^State^Zip^Phone  If errors, DSIYRET(1)="-1^Error Message If warnings, DSIYRET(1)="0^Warning Message"

rpcs.name: DSIYUTL2 VENSCH VENDOR SCH
rpcs.description: VENSCHQCTSCH This RPC returns information about Vendor Pointer File ^PRC(440) to the calling program.  It allows moves backwards and forwards through the file.
rpcs.returnDescription: DSIYRET  DSIYRET(1)="-1^Error Message" if errors DSIYRET(1)="0^Warning Message" if warnings  DSIYRET(NAME)=IEN^NAME^Synonym info if it exists^ORDERING CITY^ORDERING STATE^ORDERING ZIP

rpcs.name: DSIYUTL2 SVPTSCH SERV PTR SCH
rpcs.description: SVPTSCH RPC to return Service Pointer File entries - ^DIC(49)
rpcs.returnDescription: DSIYRET  DSIYRET(1)="-1^Error Message"  If errors DSIYRET(1)="0^Warning Message" If warnings  DSIYRET(NAME)=IEN^NAME^LOCATION

rpcs.name: DSIYUTL2 LOCSCH LOCATION SCH
rpcs.description: LOCSCH RPC to return information about the Engineering Space File ^ENG("SP") or 6928 Returns: ^TMP("DSIYUTL2",$J,ROOM)=IEN(ROOM)^BUILDING^DIVISION^WING^SERVICE
rpcs.returnDescription: DSIYRET  DSIYRET(1)="-1^Error Message"   If errors DSIYRET(1)="0^Warning Message"  If warnings  DSIYRET(ROOM)=IEN^ROOM^BUILDING^DIVISION^WING^SERVICE

rpcs.name: DSIYRPTR CRPT CHECK REPORTS
rpcs.description: Retrieve all report information from the DSIY SCHEDULED REPORTS file forr a given DUZ.
rpcs.returnDescription: COMPLETION TIME^ KILL TIME^ TASK #^ CURRENT PROGRESS^ TOTAL PROGRESS^ PERCENT DONE NOTE ALL TIMES ARE IN DATE TIME FORMAT OR -1^error message RETURNS in external format:  IEN^ CLERK^ REPORT NAME^ REPORT STATUS^ SCHEDULE TIME^ RUN TIME^

rpcs.name: DSIYRPTR STOP CANCEL REPORT
rpcs.description: Requests a specified task to stop running. No guarantee that this will always work, however, if a report is asked to stop while running and the report sees the request, the report will clean up the ^XTMP data, stop running and update the DSIYR SCHEDULED REPORTS file.
rpcs.returnDescription: RETURNS  DSIYRET(1)="1^Success message" if successful DSIYRET(1)=\'-1^Error message" if errors DSIYRET(2..XX) = messages for individual report if they cannot be killed

rpcs.name: DSIYRPTR GETRPT GET RPT DATA
rpcs.description: Retrieves stored results from a specified report.
rpcs.returnDescription: RETURNS ^ delimited array containing report data in formats that vary based on the report.  or -1^error message

rpcs.name: DSIYRPTR PRMS GET PARAMETERS
rpcs.description: Retrieves stored results from a specified report.
rpcs.returnDescription: Parameters returned can vary.  See the call for submitting the report for a layout of the parameters returned.

rpcs.name: DSIYRPTR KCHK REPORT KILL CHK
rpcs.description: This procedure is used to check to see if the report cleanup task needs to be run. If yes, the DSIYR REPORT KILL CHECK DATE parameter is updated and the cleanup task is queued.
rpcs.returnDescription: OUTPUT IS EITHER 0 (ZERO) WHICH INDICATES NO ACTION NEEDED 1 WHICH INDICATES THE REPORT CLEANUP TASK WAS SCHEDULED

rpcs.name: DSIYRPTR PROG GET RPT PROGRESS
rpcs.description: Returns progress of a specified report.
rpcs.returnDescription: Returns progress of report in format: [current progress

rpcs.name: DSIYRPT1 EOL END OF LIFE
rpcs.description: Schedules a report to retrieve equipment which has a replacement date between "today" and a specified future date.  Format of data returned: Serial#^Equipment Category^Replacement Date^Use Status^VA PM Number^Local Identifier
rpcs.returnDescription: If successful, returns:  [Task Number

rpcs.name: DSIYUTL3 CSNSCH CAT STK SCH
rpcs.description: DSIYUTL3 CSNSCH RPC TO SEARCH VIA LIST THE Category Stock Number File ^ENCSN(6917) ALLOWS USER TO MOVE UP AND DOWN THROUGH ENTRIES RETURNS ^TMP("DSIYUTL3",$J,#)=IEN^CSN^LIFE EXPECTANCY^DESCRIPTION^ACTIVE DT^DEACTIVE DT
rpcs.returnDescription: DSIYRET DSIYRET(1)="-1^Error Message"  If Errors DSIYRET(1)="0^Warning Message" If Warnings DSIYRET(#)=",$J,#)=IEN^CSN^LIFE EXPECTANCY^DESCRIPTION^ACTIVE DT^DEACTIVE DT CSN format is 4 numerics-6 numerics (11 digits) Life Expectancy is 2 digits Description can be up to 60 characters Active Date exte

rpcs.name: DSIYUTL3 CMRSCH CMR SCH
rpcs.description: DSIYUTL3 CMRSCH RPC TO SEARCH VIA LIST THE CMR FILE ^ENG(6914.1) ALLOWS USER TO MOVE UP AND DOWN THROUGH ENTRIES RETURNS ^TMP("DSIYUTL3",$J,#)=IEN^CMR^BRIEF DESCRIPTION
rpcs.returnDescription: DSIYRET  DSIYRET(1)="-1^Error Message"   If Errors DSIYRET(1)="0^Warning Message"  If Warnings  DSIYRET(#)=IEN^CMR^SERVICE^BRIEF DESCRIPTION^RESPONSIBLE OFFICIAL ^STATION^ALTERNATE RESPONSIBLE OFFICIAL

rpcs.name: DSIYUTL3 POSCH PURCH ORD SCH
rpcs.description: DSIYUTL3 POSCH PURCH ORD SCH ', "RPC to return all PO's which are found based on the search criteria ", 'entered by the user. This is different than searches which create a dropdown based on the starting search. ', "RPC calls VistA's internal FIND API to find PO's based on various XREF's.
rpcs.returnDescription: DSIYRET P8:  Amount  DSIYRET(1)="-1^Error Message"   If Errors DSIYRET(1)="0^Warning Message"  If Warnings DSIYRET(#)= following pieces: P1:  IEN to PO File P2:  External PO # P3:  PO Method P4:  PO Date P5:  Supply Status P6:  Fund Control Point FCP P7:  Vendor

rpcs.name: DSIYUTL4 FAPQUAL FAP QUAL
rpcs.description: FAPQUAL RET="Y" if all criteria met, otherwise RET="N" or " RET(1)=\'1^error description" if there is an error RPC to check to see if the current piece of equipment from file ^ENG(6914) is qualified to have an FA document sent Qualification based on: User must have security of ENFACS The Equipment Type of Entry Field (0;4, field 6914,7) must be "NX The Investment Category Field (8;2, field 6914,34) must be"1" for Capitalized/Accountable
rpcs.returnDescription: RET RET=1" if all criteria met. If RET\'="Y" then do not continue asking questions about FA documents RET(1)="-1^error description" if there is an error RET(1)="0^Warning Message" if there are warnings

rpcs.name: DSIYUTL4 FAPVAL FAP VALIDATE
rpcs.description: FAPVAL RPC to return whether or not all fields pass validation in order to be allowed to send a piece of equipment to the FA Document file Calls ^ENFAACQ existing routine
rpcs.returnDescription: RET RET(1)="-1^Error description" if there is an error.  Also, if there is an error, RET(X) will contain further description of the reasons the piece of equipment could not be transferred.  RET(1)=1" if all is good to go. RET(1)="0^Warning Message" if there are warnings

rpcs.name: DSIYRPT2 ACTEQ ACTIVE EQUIP

EQUIPMENT NAME(text)^ENTRY NUMBER(number) RET(1)=$$REC^123456^NON-EXPENDABLE EQPT^TEST,USER^AUG 22, 2013^ DEFIBRILLATOR W/O MONITOR^1 equipment in the EQUIPMENT
rpcs.returnDescription: If successful, returns:  [Task Number

rpcs.description: FAPUPDT This RPC allows the user to update the FA Documents replacing the questions asked as the end of a normal Equipment Inventory Session. This will only be called if the Equipment qualifies (using RPC FAPVAL^DSIYUTL4)for having an FAP document.
rpcs.returnDescription: RET considered a good outcome as the Adjustment Voucher area is not required.  RET(1)="-1^Error Description" if there is an error. RET(1)="0^Warning Message"  if there are warnings  RET(1)="1Y^Message" if completed successfully.  NOTE:  If the user chooses not to have an Adjustment Voucher - OR - th

rpcs.name: DSIYUTL5 PMDISDEC DISPLAY DEC
rpcs.description: PMDISDEC', "maintenance but the piece of equipment's category in ^ENG(6911) has ", 'product maintenance values (then a further RPC will ask the user if they want to use these values for this piece of equipment)  RET(1)="N" if neither This RPC verifies whether a piece of equipment has Product Maintenance values set up in either the Equipment Management file, the Equipment Category File or none at all and returns:  RET(1)="E" If the Equipment Management File ^ENG(6914) has product maintenance alre
rpcs.returnDescription: RETURN PARAMETER  DSIYRET(1)="0^Warning"     If there are warnings/nothing returned DSIYRET(1)="-1^Error"      If there are errors DSIYRET(1)=TYPE TYPE="E" If the equipment has PM setup TYPE="C" If the Equipment Category has PM setup TYPE="N" If neither have PM setup

rpcs.name: DSIYRPT2 STATUS STAT RPT
rpcs.description: Schedules a report consisting of requested fields for all equipment in the EQUIPMENT INV. (#6914) file with one of the requested USE STATUSes.  The data for this report can be retrieved via the DSIYRPTR GETRPT GET RPT DATA RPC. Data returned will consist of the fields requested in the order the fields were submitted. If the data exceeds string length limits, the data will be broken up over multiple lines. Because of this, the first piece of each record will be "$$REC"
rpcs.returnDescription: If successful, returns:  [Task Number

rpcs.name: DSIYRPT2 MFGLST MFG LIST
rpcs.description: Schedules a report consisting of all equipment in file #6914 RET(1)=186^SEARS ROEBUCK^186ABC^DRILL-ELECTRIC^IN USE^VA186-0001^VA186ID listed for requested manufacturers having a requested USE STATUS. The data returned by the DSIYRPTR GETRPT GET RPT DATA is as follows: RET(0) is header column data RET(1-n) is record data, each record will begin with Serial# in piece 1  Example: RET(0)=Serial#(text)^Equipment Category(text)^Use Status(text)^VAPM Number(number)^Local Identifier(text)
rpcs.returnDescription: If successful, returns:  [Task Number

rpcs.name: DSIYUTL5 PMUPDT UPDATE PM DATA
rpcs.description: PMUPDT within the responsible shop, it will be replaced with new data.   Else, new nodes will be added for each.  RET(1) = IEN for Responsible Shop multiple ^ Comment showing frequency added successfully RPC which allows update of the two multiples within the Equipment Management file for Responsible Shop & Frequencies.  GUI must send all data for the Responsible shop or current data will be replaced with nulls.  If the responsible shop exists in ^ENG(6914,IEN) it will be replaced with new data.
rpcs.returnDescription: RETURN PARAMETER NOTE:  A successful update can be done without a frequency.  RET(1)=-1 if errors RET(1)="0^Warning Message"  if there are warnings RET(X) = further description of errors if data errors occurred  RET(1)=IEN of Responsible Shop multiple ^ "Frequency updated successfully if all updated

rpcs.name: DSIYUTL5 PMCAT2EQ COPY CAT EQ
rpcs.description: PMCAT2EQ RPC If the user chooses to keep the Product Maintenance (PM) from the Equipment Category file and apply it to this piece of equipment, this RPC will copy the data from ^ENG(6911) to ^ENG(6914) for both the responsible shop and frequency multiples.
rpcs.returnDescription: RETURN PARAMETER  RET(1)=-1 if there are problems with the copy RET(1)="0^Warning Message" if there are warnings Else all is good

rpcs.name: DSIYUTL7 EQMAINT MAINT PERFMD
rpcs.description: EQMAINT RPC to return equipment maintenance information for a piece of equipment, will return a message indicating no maintenance if none was performed, else the return value will be:  RET(#)=IEN^Date^Type of Maintenance^Work Order#^Status^Work Performed
rpcs.returnDescription: RETURN PARAMETER  DSIYRET(1)="0^No Maintenance Performed on this Piece of Equipment" if no maintenance found,  Else  DSIYRET(#) = IEN^Date of Maintenance (internal VistA format)^Type of Maintenance^Work Order #^Status^Work Performed (first 30 characters)

RCP to return Work Orders when searching by several types of fields.  Because of the nature of this search, not all fields can be combined.

rpcs.name: DSIYWO2 WOINFO WO INFO

rpcs.returnDescription: RETURN PARAMETER  Returns data for each field in the Work Order File ^ENG(6920), does not return data for Word Processing Fields or Multiple Fields  DSIYRET(#) = Field # ^ Table Name/Description ^ Internal Value ^ External Value  DSIYRET(1)=-1^error message if errors are found

rpcs.name: DSIYWO4A WOVAL VALIDATE
rpcs.description: WOVAL  Validates the data in the Work Order file based on data sent from the GUI screen.
rpcs.returnDescription: RETURN PARAMETER must answer YES to this question in order for the GUI to go onto the next step.  If there is nothing in the second piece, then no validation is needed. DSIYRET("X") = Transfer Message DSIYRET("D") = Disapprove Message  DSIYRET(1)="-1" If there are errors, errors will be further desc

rpcs.name: DSIYWO5 WOEDIT EDIT WO
rpcs.description: WOEDIT  Pre-check for editing a Work Order
rpcs.returnDescription: RETURN PARAMETER  If there is nothing in the second piece, then no validation is needed.  DSIYRET(1)="-1^Error message" if there are problems  DSIYRET(1)=1^Validation Message (if needed)  If DSIYRET(1)=1 but the second piece has a Validation Message - the user must answer YES to this question in ord

rpcs.returnDescription: RETURN PARAMETER  Returns:  DSIYRET(1)="-1^Error message" if there are problems with the deletion DSIYRET(1)="1^DELETION APPROVED" if it is OK to delete this work order

rpcs.name: DSIYWO6 WODEL2 DEL WO
rpcs.description: WODEL2  Deletes an existing WO RPC DSIYWO6 WODEL1 must be called first to verify that the delete is approved.  The GUI must also ask the user to CONFIRM the delete before calling this RPC
rpcs.returnDescription: RETURN PARAMETER  DSIYRET(1)="-1^Error message" If there are problems with the delete DSIYRET(1)="1^DELETION COMPLETE" If the deletion was finished

rpcs.returnDescription: RETURN PARAMETER  DSIYRET(1)="-1^Error Message" If errors are found DSIYRET(1)="0^Warning Message" If there are warnings DSIYRET(1)=Assigned Technician Internal^Assigned Technician External^0^0^Shop Default Internal^Shop Default External  (This RPC returns data exactly as the WOTECH RPC returns data

rpcs.name: DSIYWO2 WOTCHSHP FIND SHOP
rpcs.description: WOTCHSHP Call this RPC after a Primary Technician is changed ONLY if the current SHOP value (field #9) is empty.  Technician Multi: When entering a NEW line for the Technician Multi, call this RPC after they enter the technician info and display the SHOP as a default.  When changing an existing line for a Technician Multi, call this RPC only ', "if the shop value for that technician's line on the multi is currently ", 'empty - if so then default to this new SHOP.  This RPC is used to find the de
rpcs.returnDescription: RETURN PARAMETER  DSIYRET(1)=     "-1^Error Message"    If Errors DSIYRET(1)=     "0^Warning Message"   If Warnings DSIYRET(1)=     Shop Internal ^ Shop External

rpcs.name: DSIYWO2 WOTCHTRG TRIG FLDS
rpcs.description: WOTCHTRG  After the RPC is called, the GUI needs to redisplay these fields.  The user has the ability to override TOTAL HOURS before saving but does not have the ability to change TOTAL LABOR COST.  This RPC triggers changes to the fields: TOTAL HOURS TOTAL LABOR COST  This RPC should be called whenever a Technician Multi value is changed or added.  After the user clicks OK on the Technician Multi, this RPC needs to be called to recompute the above fields.
rpcs.returnDescription: RETURN PARAMETER  DSIYRET(1)=    "-1^Error Message"    If Errors DSIYRET(1)=    "0^Warning Message"   If Warnings DSIYRET(1)=    Total Hours ^ Total Labor Cost

For the Deferred option, it returns a list of equipment with PM of Deferred and a date assigned within the date range specified.  For the No PM Scheduled option, it returns a list of equipment which was entered within that last 6 months that has no PM scheduled.

rpcs.name: DSIYV04 CHKDUP
rpcs.description: Returns a list of vendors which are potential duplicates with the entry that the user is adding as a new vendor.  It compares the vendor name and taxid using the B and D cross-reference of the file.  One of the parameters can be null, but not both.  It expects that at least 3 characters are entered for the vendor name.  If more than 10 characters are entered on the name, it looks for matches with the first 10 characters.
rpcs.returnDescription: DSIYRET(IEN)=IEN^TAXID^NAME - local array DSIYRET(1)=0^No potential duplicates found

rpcs.name: DSIYV04 SENDVRQ
rpcs.description: Queues a new or edited vendor record to be sent to Austin when a change has been made to the record.  This rpc is called under the following conditions:', "   1. FISCAL REVIEW OF FMS is 'N'", '   2. All fields required for FMS are entered 3. There is a change requiring an FMS transaction', "   4. The user has responding 'Y' to the 'Send a VRQ' question
rpcs.returnDescription: Indicates whether the vendor request queueing was successful or not.  Either: 1^Creating the FMS VENDOR REQUEST 0^Unable to create the FMS VENDOR REQUEST

rpcs.name: DVBA CAPRI PARAM UPDATE
rpcs.description: This RPC allows CAPRI to update CAPRI Parameter values. If the parameter has multiples, then the multiple instance values are sent in the 3rd input parameter (DVBVAL) separated by vertical bars ("|"). The RPC will delete all instances and replace them with the new values in DVBVAL.  If a single null value is sent, then all instances are deleted. For word processing values, the bars "|" can be used in place of carriage returns. If the information is longer than 250 characters, the RPC will break
rpcs.returnDescription: Return value will be one of the following: OR An error message indicating why the parameter list was not deleted OR Issue trying to split Data <successful update count>/<total update count> was(were) successful^<unsuccessful instance and reason>|<unsuccessful instance and reason> Word Processing Par

rpcs.name: PX ICE WEB
rpcs.description: Call the ICE web service to get the list of recommended immunizations for a given patient. The RPC takes one parameter, the Patient IEN (DFN). See the RETURN PARAMETER DESCRIPTION for the details on the format of the returned array. There must be at least one entry defined in File 920.75, PX ICE WEB SERVER. If there is more than one entry, then the Site Parameter, PX ICE WEB DEFAULT SERVER, specifies which entry is to be used.
rpcs.returnDescription: If Unsuccessful: n) = If SOAP call was unsuccessful, this will be the message returned by the ICE server.  If Successful: 0) = 1 ^ Number of Lines n) = GRP ^ Vaccine Group Name ^ Group/CVX Code Recommended ^ Group/CVX Display Name ^ Earliest Recommended Date ^ Overdue Date ^ Recommend Code ^ Recomme

INPUT:  NPIEN - NEW PERSON FILE #200 INTERNAL ENTRY NUMBER  OUTPUT: RET - A STRING OF DEA INFORMATION DELIMITED

rpcs.name: PSO EPCS VERSION

rpcs.name: PSO EPCS VA# DUP CHECK
rpcs.description: This RPC will accept a VA# in text format, and a provider's NEW", 'PERSON File #200 IEN (Internal Entry number).  It will perform checking to determine if the VA# is being used by another provider.
rpcs.returnDescription: The return value will be: 1^Success - for a VA# that is not being used by any provider other than the provider being checked. 0^Duplicate information if the VA# is being used by another provider.

rpcs.name: PSO EPCS FILER

rpcs.returnDescription: The return value will be: 1^Success - For data that did file successfully 0^Data did not file successfully

rpcs.name: MAG DICOM P350 FIX FAIL IMAGES
rpcs.description: The CLEANUP OF JPEG IMAGES STORED AS DICOM IMAGES file (#2006.59935) is created by MAG*3.0*350.  Errors can occur in the processing of the images. A Storage SCP is needed for processing and if one is not present, the images go into "FAIL" state.  This RPC resets the image state to "UNKNOWN" so that they can be reprocessed.
rpcs.returnDescription: Count of image entries fixed.

rpcs.name: MAG DICOM P350 UPDATE FIELDS
rpcs.description: After the DICOM image is acquired and processed, this RPC is used to update field in the IMAGE file (#2005).  The following fields are updated 6 ----- PROCEDURE - copied from original JPEG.DCM IMAGE entry 40 ---- PACKAGE INDEX - copied from original JPEG.DCM IMAGE entry 42 ---- TYPE INDEX - copied from original JPEG.DCM IMAGE entry - 45 ---- ORIGIN - copied from original JPEG.DCM IMAGE entry 113.3 - STATUS REASON - pointer to ^MAG(2005.8,19)
rpcs.returnDescription: Return has counts in five "^" fields 1 - Number of file updated that have already been completed 2 - Number of file updates that have been performed on this call 3 - Number of images that have not yet been processed 4 - Error #1 - ^MAG(2006.59935,D0,0) entry is missing 5 - Error #2 - SOP Instance UI

rpcs.description: This RPC is returning data from the DVBAB CAPRI CMT TOGGLE parameter. This value tells the CAPRI GUI which C&P type is being used, CMT or Pascal.
rpcs.returnDescription: Value for toggle in the CAPRI GUI, 1=CMT or 2=PASCAL

rpcs.name: DVBA CAPRI GET EXAM HISTORY
rpcs.description: Allows the CAPRI user to get the exam history for a given worksheet.
rpcs.returnDescription: Exam Sequence Number^Exam Name^Exam Save Number^Exam save date^Save Message^Version^User  Otherwise one of the following: -1^No worksheet IEN was provided -1^Worksheet IEN=<ien> does not exist -1^Worksheet IEN=<ien> has no exam history

rpcs.name: DVBA CAPRI EXAM RESTORE
rpcs.description: RPC will allow user to restore an exam, even ones deleted, to a previous version based on save sequence numbers displayed in the Exam History RPC.
rpcs.returnDescription: Return 1 for successful restore -1^Missing_"Worksheet IEN,Exam Seq,Exam Name,Save Seq,Save DateTime The first found piece missing will be listed above -1^Invalid DateTime Format -1^Incorrect Exam Name and Seq Number -1^Worksheet IEN/Save Seq do not match Save DateTime and Exam Name -1^Error with PDF

rpcs.name: DVBA CAPRI TEMP DEF LIST

rpcs.name: DVBA CAPRI SECURITY TOGGLE
rpcs.description: This RPC is returning data from the DVBAB CAPRI SECURITY TOGGLE parameter.  This value tells the CAPRI GUI which security field(s) must be validated to allow GUI access.
rpcs.returnDescription: Value for toggle in the CAPRI GUI, 1 = Additional SSN Check 2 = Additional SecID Check 3 = Additional SSN and SecID Check 4 = No additional security checks

rpcs.name: DVBA CAPRI PDF SIG FIELD NAMES

rpcs.name: DVBA CAPRI SAVE REVIEW DATA
rpcs.description: CAPRI GUI will call RPC to save details for each review action
rpcs.returnDescription: One of the following messages will be sent back: -1^Review Comments not Saved -1^Worksheet not updated 1^Trainee DUZ and DIV Saved 1^Review Details saved and Worksheet Updated -1^No Worksheet IEN sent -1^Invalid Worksheet IEN -1^Invalid Status -1^Missing Status -1^Invalid Trainee Comments -1^Invalid

rpcs.name: DVBA CAPRI TRAINEE DOC MANAGER
rpcs.description: RPC Used only to update Document Manager Field to Trainee before Signature Validation
rpcs.returnDescription: Will return 1 if update processed or -1^No Worksheet IEN sent -1^Invalid Worksheet IEN -1^No Update

rpcs.name: DVBA CAPRI TRAINEE SIGNATURE
rpcs.description: Returns the DUZ and DIV for the Trainee that filled out the Worksheet.
rpcs.returnDescription: Trainee DUZ^DIV or -1^No Worksheet IEN sent -1^Invalid Worksheet IEN -1^No details found

rpcs.name: DVBA CAPRI STATUS COUNT

rpcs.returnDescription: Awaiting signature count^Draft/not ready count^Outdated template count^Review pending count^Sent back count

rpcs.name: DVBA CAPRI ALERTS DATA
rpcs.description: Returns the data for the following worksheet review statuses: A=Awaiting Signature, D=Draft/Not ready, O=Outdated Template, P=Review Pending, S=Sent Back  The "P" status needs to be specifically requested (via the 2nd input parameter DVBST).  If this does not happen, then data is only returned for statuses: A,D,O and S.
rpcs.returnDescription: Data will be returned in an array as follows: RET(<worksheet ien>)=Worksheet IEN^ID^Patient IEN^Patien name^Document manager IEN^Document manager name^Form title^Review status^Flag new^Flag green flag^Flag exclamation^<exam count>^<exam 1 name>,<exam 2 name>,...  OR -1^No data available

rpcs.name: DVBA CAPRI PDF LOGIC TOGGLE

rpcs.returnDescription: Array will return at least one entry or the array of DBQ that need to skip the conditional logic. -1^Error Message RTN(1)="ALL RTN(1)=0 RTN(1)="Single DBQ_515 RTN(2)="Additional DBQs_151"

rpcs.returnDescription: 1 sets TIU Note full value of the PDF, 0 sets TIU Note to abbreviated text to direct users to CAPRI to view PDF document.
